🎯 Interview Prep — DevOps Engineer (OpenShift & Kubernetes)

Based on Job Description: DevOps Engineer with expertise in OpenShift, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Security, Monitoring, and Infrastructure Automation.

📋 JD Summary

Area Requirement
Container Orchestration OpenShift & Kubernetes cluster management, high availability, scalability
CI/CD Design & maintain pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or similar)
Collaboration Cross-functional DevOps integration with Dev & Ops teams
Monitoring Cluster health, performance, incident response
Security Container security best practices, compliance controls
Automation Infrastructure provisioning & configuration management
AI / AIOps AI-assisted tooling, intelligent automation, ML-powered observability
Documentation Deployment processes, system architecture

📚 Interview Question Modules

# File Topic Questions
1 OpenShift & Kubernetes Core Architecture, workloads, networking, storage, SCC 25
2 CI/CD Pipelines Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Tekton, GitOps, ArgoCD 24
3 Security & Compliance SCC, RBAC, secrets, DevSecOps, network policies 18
4 Monitoring & Troubleshooting Prometheus, Grafana, logging, incident response 18
5 Infrastructure & Automation Terraform, Ansible, Helm, GitOps, IaC 18
6 Scenario-Based Questions Real-world production problems end-to-end 15
7 Behavioral Questions STAR-method answers aligned to the JD 14
8 Python Scripting Automation scripts, K8s SDK, CLI tools, testing 20
9 AI for DevOps AIOps, LLMs, anomaly detection, MLOps, AI pipelines 15

Total: 167 questions with full answers

🏷️ Difficulty Legend

Symbol Level
🟢 Beginner
🟡 Intermediate
🔴 Advanced / Senior
🔵 Scenario / Troubleshooting
🟣 Behavioral

🗓️ Suggested Study Plan

Day Focus
Day 1–2 Module 1 — OpenShift & Kubernetes Core
Day 3–4 Module 2 — CI/CD Pipelines
Day 5 Module 3 — Security & Compliance
Day 6 Module 4 — Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Day 7 Module 5 — Infrastructure & Automation
Day 8 Module 8 — Python Scripting for DevOps
Day 9 Module 9 — AI for DevOps (AIOps, MLOps, LLMs)
Day 10 Module 6 — Scenario Walk-throughs (verbal practice)
Day 11 Module 7 — Behavioral Questions (STAR method)
Day 12 Full mock interview — all modules

Tip: Print or bookmark this README. Walk through each module in order, answer questions out loud before reading the answer.
